query: SELECT COUNT(*) as mismatched_count FROM students s LEFT JOIN (SELECT studentId, COUNT(*) as vote_count FROM teacher_votes GROUP BY studentId) v ON s.id = v.studentId WHERE s.score != COALESCE(v.vote_count, 0) * 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as mismatched_count FROM students s LEFT JOIN (SELECT studentId, COUNT(*) as vote_count FROM teacher_votes GROUP BY studentId) v ON s.id = v.studentId WHERE s.score != COALESCE(v.vote_count, 0) * 10;
